lines: Almost 6 months of showing up every day just to earn your yes. I never stopped after that. Not once in 4 years.
And then someone who called themselves a friend took all of that and burned it down. Not you. Not me. Them.
I keep thinking about everything we built together. Every little thing that was ours. How do I just let that go because of someone who was never even worth your time.
4 years is not nothing. Almost 5 if you count every day I spent trying to be the person you deserved before you even said yes.
I am not angry at you. I never was. I am heartbroken that we lost something real because of something that was never real.
I still choose you. After everything. I still choose you the same way I chose you every single morning for 4 years.
Please do not let them win. Please do not let them be the reason this ends. We are worth more than that. You know we are.
sign: still yours if you will have me, Kiel
